title: Employee 360 — Central Hub Accessible from Any Workflow
description: Authorized users shall be able to open an Employee 360 profile from Global Search, Employee Directory, Enrollment, Life Event, Eligibility, Payroll, Carrier Transaction, and COBRA workflows. The profile header shows identity, status, and primary actions.

title: Employee Demographic Information — Core Identity Fields with SSN Masking
description: The profile shall maintain all core demographic fields. SSN is always displayed masked (XXX-XX-1234) in all UI, API responses, notifications, and logs. Access to unmasked SSN requires elevated RBAC permission and audit logging.
securityConstraint: SSN plaintext must never appear in server logs, application logs, error messages, or audit records

title: Address Management — Home, Mailing, and Previous Addresses with Effective Dating
description: The system shall allow authorized users to create and update employee addresses. Home address, mailing address, and previous addresses are all stored with effective dates.

title: Name Change — Preserves History, Triggers Carrier and Payroll Identity Update
description: Authorized users shall be able to update an employee's legal name. The system preserves prior name history, triggers a carrier identity update transaction, updates the payroll identity record, and creates an audit event.

title: Employment Information — Status, Class, Job, Department, and Key Dates
description: The profile shall maintain complete employment information including all fields used by eligibility rules and plan configurations.

title: Employment Class Change — Automatically Triggers Eligibility and Enrollment Cascade
description: When an employment class change is saved (e.g. Part-Time → Full-Time), the system shall automatically trigger eligibility recalculation, identify any new plan eligibility, raise a qualifying status change event, update payroll, create a carrier transaction, and notify the employee. The system shall not auto-enroll the employee unless plan rules explicitly permit it.

title: Compensation Management — Salary Change with Salary-Based Benefit Impact Analysis
description: Authorized users shall be able to update employee compensation (annual salary, hourly rate, pay frequency, effective date). The system identifies salary-based benefits (Life, AD&D, LTD, disability) that are impacted by the salary change.

title: Payroll Identity Mapping — Employee-to-Payroll-System ID and Deduction Code Mapping
description: Each employee shall maintain payroll identity mappings linking the benefits platform employee ID to the external payroll system's employee ID and benefit-specific deduction codes.

title: Carrier Identity Mapping — Per-Carrier Member ID and Subscriber ID
description: The system shall maintain carrier-specific identity mappings for each employee. Different carriers use different identifiers; the system stores all carrier identity records on the employee profile.

title: Change Propagation Engine — Downstream Impact Classification for Every Profile Change
description: The system shall classify every employee profile change by type and determine downstream systems affected: eligibility, enrollment, payroll, carrier, and audit. The propagation engine generates the appropriate transactions automatically.

title: Effective Dating — All Employment and Compensation Changes Are Date-Stamped
description: All employment and compensation changes shall support effective dating. The system preserves the historical record of all prior values with their effective periods.

title: Employee Change History — Chronological Log Linked to Audit Records
description: The Employee 360 profile shall display a chronological change history. Each entry links to the corresponding audit record.

title: Profile Validation — Required Fields, Uniqueness, and Business Rules
description: The system shall validate employee profile data on save. Validation catches required field violations, uniqueness conflicts, and business-rule violations.

title: New Hire Workflow — 5-Step Creation with Automatic Eligibility Calculation
description: HR Admin shall be able to create a new employee through a structured workflow. After creation, the system automatically calculates the eligibility date and creates an enrollment opportunity.
postCreationAutomation: Calculate eligibility date from hire date and configured waiting period

title: Change Impact Preview — Show Downstream Impact Before Saving Significant Changes
description: Before saving significant employee profile changes (employment class, status, location, salary), the system shall display a downstream impact preview showing which systems will be affected. The administrator confirms before applying.

title: AI Employee Change Impact Analysis — Natural Language Downstream Impact Summary
description: The AI Operations Assistant shall explain the downstream impact of proposed employee profile changes in plain language. The AI summarizes which systems are affected and recommends next steps.

exampleInteraction.query: Linda is moving from part-time to full-time on August 1. What changes?

response.payroll: New deduction codes may be required
